profile.title: Profile
profile.genderWarning: Please set your gender — it's required for tournament scoring.

run.noSegmentsCompleted: No segments were unlocked on this run.

segments.shareText: Try this running segment on SplitRace: {{name}}

report.title: Report cheating
report.subtitle: Reporting {{name}}. Describe what makes their performance look suspicious.
report.placeholder: e.g. impossible pace for segment X, finished too fast for their usual fitness...

creator.title: Create
creator.tournamentNameHelp: Give the tournament a short, clear name that participants will recognize.
creator.descriptionHelp: Describe the rules, format, and important details. The description supports basic formatting.
creator.locationHelp: Country is required. City is optional, but it helps runners find local tournaments.
creator.segmentsCountHelp: Set how many segments are in the tournament and how many of them count for scoring.
creator.ratedSegmentsHelp: Rated segments must be fewer than the total.
creator.pickSegmentsHint: Add exactly the required number of segments and mark the rated ones. Selected segments disappear from the available list.
creator.noSegmentsYet: You do not have any segments yet.
creator.mapHint: Click the map to draw the segment route. Add at least start and finish points; click the last point or use Undo to adjust.
creator.routeRequired: Draw the segment route on the map before creating it.

landing.heroSubtitle: Join GPS-based running tournaments. Race against real people on real segments — your phone is your judge.
landing.heroNote: Free to start. No equipment beyond your phone needed.
landing.f1Text: Join scheduled tournaments with leaderboards. Multiple segments, gender-separated scoring, and bonus points for completing the full course.
landing.f2Text: Run along carefully picked GPS routes in your city. Each segment has a defined start and finish — beat your time, beat others.
landing.f3Text: Track your run with the app in your pocket. Keep your phone locked — we record the full route in the background.
landing.step1Text: Sign up with email in seconds. Pick your gender — it's used to keep scoring fair.
landing.step2Text: Browse active tournaments in your city. One tap to join — no entry fee.
landing.step3Text: Open the app, tap Start, and run. We match your GPS track to tournament segments automatically and update the leaderboard.
landing.clubsTitle: Host tournaments for your running community
landing.clubsText: Register as a running club, create your own segments and tournaments, then submit them for admin approval before launch.
